message:
test(scripting): comprehensive tests for types, dispatcher, and WASM engine (wa-30t5n)

Add 3 previously untracked source files (types.rs, dispatcher.rs,
lua_engine.rs) that were written during the scripting engine epic but
never committed, plus their benchmark harness.

New test coverage in this commit:
- types.rs: 28 tests including property-based tests for HookHandler
  filter matching, priority ordering, EngineCapabilities merge
  commutativity, and min_opt helper
- dispatcher.rs: 13 new edge-case tests for constructor validation,
  nonexistent hook/extension handling, multi-engine error aggregation,
  ID uniqueness, and single-engine capability passthrough
- wasm_engine.rs: 12 new tests for missing entrypoint, invalid WASM
  binary, priority-ordered firing, filter semantics, json_to_dynamic
  edge cases (negative ints, nested objects, empty containers)

All 238 tests pass (229 lib + 9 integration).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
